title: Frame Studio: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Frame Studio captures portraits, weddings and brands with a calm, unhurried eye, so every frame feels like you.
One studio for every moment that matters. No juggling five photographers.
cards: Natural, flattering portraits that look like the real you.
Full-day coverage that quietly keeps up with every moment.
Product and lifestyle images that make your brand shine.
We chase the good light so your photos glow on their own.
Subtle edits that keep skin, color and texture true to life.
High-resolution images plus albums you will actually hold.

sections.text: No guesswork on the day. We plan the look together, then show up relaxed and ready so you can just be present.
bullets: A pre-shoot call to plan the look
A shot list, so nothing gets missed
An online gallery to share and download

sections.text: We retouch to flatter, never to fake. Colors stay true, skin stays real, and the mood stays exactly as you remember it.
bullets: Color graded for a consistent look
Backup copies kept safe for a year

steps: Share the occasion, the vibe and your dates.
Pick a slot and reserve it with a small deposit.
Receive a sneak peek fast, then the full set.

sections.quote: Frame Studio made us forget the camera was even there. The gallery felt like our day, not a stiff photo shoot. Every shot was us.
sections.author: Sample Couple

sections.sub: Pick a session. Add prints and albums anytime.

items: How soon will I see my photos?
A sneak peek arrives within 48 hours, with the full gallery delivered in two to three weeks.
We send a simple style guide after booking and are happy to help you plan outfits.
Yes. Local sessions are included, and travel beyond the city is quoted up front.
Every gallery includes a print store, and albums can be added to any package.
We reschedule weather-dependent shoots at no extra cost, or move indoors.

sections.sub: Tell us about your shoot and we will reply within a day with dates and ideas.

sections.tagline: Portraits, weddings and brand photography with a calm, natural eye. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Frame Studio is a sample template with dummy content
